title: Nephrodium inaequale
taxonomy: Nephrodium inaequale is a species of fern, and its classification is as follows: it belongs to the family Matoniaceae and the order Matoniales. This family and order are part of the larger division Pteridophyta, which includes all ferns and their allies. Within the family Matoniaceae, Nephrodium inaequale is considered to be closely related to other species such as Matonia pectinata. The classification of Nephrodium inaequale is based on its morphological characteristics, including its frond shape and leaf venation. Further research may be needed to confirm the exact classification of this species.
